description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set on a rectangular plot with a low, horizontal profile. The structure features a main block with several attached sections, including a prominent front entrance area and a few smaller side extensions. The roof appears flat or gently sloped, with minimal overhangs and a simple, modern silhouette. Windows are distributed asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, providing varied natural light. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with the main building in a light beige and the surrounding ground in a reddish-brown. The overall design is functional and unornamented, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story, modern bungalow with a flat roof, asymmetrical window arrangement, and neutral exterior tones on a rectangular plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, several windows, and the primary facade with attached side sections.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's low profile, flat roof, and the elongated layout of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back extensions and a less prominent entrance, with fewer visible windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the overall length of the bungalow along the plot.
